languages.text: "Вздор!" {n}Лишенная привычных четок, герцогиня впивается пальцами в богато украшенный пояс.{/n} "От нее я узнала лишь о том, что Оведий прибудет без сопровождения. Мой дом многие годы борется с влиянием этих сервитороголовых выскочек, было бы глупо не воспользоваться блестящей возможностью..." {n}Камилла замолкает, услышав собственные слова. На мгновение ее глаза мутнеют, будто треснувшее стекло. Она становится похожа на до слез обиженную старуху. Герцогиня делает шаг вперед, бусина, попавшая под ее каблук лопается.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Стартуем DL_KnowJuvennaIntrigue и Obj3_Add_JuvennaIntrigue, финишируем Obj2_TalkKamille с Obj2_Add_KamillaIntrigue

traits.locale_text: "Вздор!" {n}Лишенная привычных четок, герцогиня впивается пальцами в край камзола.{/n} "От нее я узнала лишь о том, что Оведий прибудет без сопровождения. Мой дом многие годы борется с влиянием этих сервитороголовых выскочек, было бы глупо не воспользоваться блестящей возможностью..." {n}Камилла замолкает, услышав собственные слова. На мгновение ее глаза мутнеют, будто треснувшее стекло. Она становится похожа на до слез обиженную старуху. Герцогиня делает шаг вперед, бусина, попавшая под ее каблук лопается.{/n}

languages.translation_comment: Стартуем DL_KnowJuvennaIntrigue и Obj3_Add_JuvennaIntrigue, финишируем Obj2_TalkKamille с Obj2_Add_KamillaIntrigue

languages.text: "Nonsense!" {n}Bereft of her usual prayer beads, the duchess digs her fingers into the edge of her ornately decorated belt.{/n} "All she told me was that Ovedius Gaprak would arrive unaccompanied. For years, my house has battled against the influence of those servitor-brained upstarts; it would have been foolish not to seize such a shining opportunity..." {n}The duchess falls silent upon hearing her own words. Her eyes briefly cloud over like cracked glass, and suddenly she looks like a tearful, hurt old woman. She takes a step forward, crushing a bead under her heel.{/n}

languages.text: 「そんなことないわ！」{n}いつもは念珠を手にしているが、今回は念珠がない。代わりに、華やかな装飾が施されたベルトの端を指で掴む。{/n}「オベディウス・ガプラクが、一人来る、とだけ言っていたわ。長年、この家では、家臣の頭脳を持つ若者たちの影響力と戦ってきたわ。こんな輝かしい機会を逃すなんて、愚かだったわ…」{n}自分の言葉に、公爵夫人は黙り込んだ。彼女の目は、割れたガラスのように曇り、突然、涙を流す傷ついた老女のように見えた。彼女は一歩前に進み、念珠を踵で踏みつぶした。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nonsense!" {n}Bereft of her usual prayer beads, the duchess digs her fingers into the edge of her ornately decorated belt.{/n} "All she told me was that Ovedius Gaprak would arrive unaccompanied. For years, my house has battled against the influence of those servitor-brained upstarts; it would have been foolish not to seize such a shining opportunity..." {n}The duchess falls silent upon hearing her own words. Her eyes briefly cloud over like cracked glass, and suddenly she looks like a tearful, hurt old woman. She takes a step forward, crushing a bead under her heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「そんなことないわ！」{n}いつもは念珠を手にしているが、今回は念珠がない。代わりに、華やかな装飾が施されたベルトの端を指で掴む。{/n}「オベディウス・ガプラクが、一人来る、とだけ言っていたわ。長年、この家では、家臣の頭脳を持つ若者たちの影響力と戦ってきたわ。こんな輝かしい機会を逃すなんて、愚かだったわ…」{n}自分の言葉に、公爵夫人は黙り込んだ。彼女の目は、割れたガラスのように曇り、突然、涙を流す傷ついた老女のように見えた。彼女は一歩前に進み、念珠を踵で踏みつぶした。{/n}

languages.text: “胡说八道！”{n}没了平时捻在手中的念珠，女爵只好把手指死死抠进那条装饰华丽的腰带边缘。{/n}“她只告诉我说奥维迪乌斯·贾帕克会独自前来。我的家族跟那帮机仆脑袋的暴发户斗了这么多年。如此良机，岂能错过……”{n}说完之后，女爵陷入了沉默。她的眼神瞬间变得如碎裂的玻璃般朦胧，突然之间，她看起来就像一个泪眼婆娑、满心伤痕的老妇人。她往前迈了一步，鞋跟碾碎了一颗珠子。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nonsense!" {n}Bereft of her usual prayer beads, the duchess digs her fingers into the edge of her ornately decorated belt.{/n} "All she told me was that Ovedius Gaprak would arrive unaccompanied. For years, my house has battled against the influence of those servitor-brained upstarts; it would have been foolish not to seize such a shining opportunity..." {n}The duchess falls silent upon hearing her own words. Her eyes briefly cloud over like cracked glass, and suddenly she looks like a tearful, hurt old woman. She takes a step forward, crushing a bead under her heel.{/n}

languages.text: "Saçmalık!" {n}Her zamanki tespihinden yoksun olan düşes, parmaklarını süslü kemerinin kenarına geçiriyor.{/n} "Bana tek söylediği, Ovedius Gaprak'ın yanında kimse olmadan geleceğiydi. Yıllardır hanem o hizmetör beyinli sonradan görmelerin etkisine karşı savaşıyor, böylesine parlak bir fırsatı değerlendirmemek aptallık olurdu..." {n}Düşes, kendi sözlerini duyunca sessizleşiyor. Gözleri kısa bir süreliğine çatlak bir cam gibi bulanıklaşıyor ve aniden gözü yaşlı, incinmiş yaşlı bir kadın gibi görünüyor. Öne doğru adım atarak topuğunun altında bir boncuğu eziyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nonsense!" {n}Bereft of her usual prayer beads, the duchess digs her fingers into the edge of her ornately decorated belt.{/n} "All she told me was that Ovedius Gaprak would arrive unaccompanied. For years, my house has battled against the influence of those servitor-brained upstarts; it would have been foolish not to seize such a shining opportunity..." {n}The duchess falls silent upon hearing her own words. Her eyes briefly cloud over like cracked glass, and suddenly she looks like a tearful, hurt old woman. She takes a step forward, crushing a bead under her heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Saçmalık!" {n}Her zamanki tespihinden yoksun olan düşes, parmaklarını süslü kemerinin kenarına geçiriyor.{/n} "Bana tek söylediği, Ovedius Gaprak'ın yanında kimse olmadan geleceğiydi. Yıllardır hanem o hizmetör beyinli sonradan görmelerin etkisine karşı savaşıyor, böylesine parlak bir fırsatı değerlendirmemek aptallık olurdu..." {n}Düşes, kendi sözlerini duyunca sessizleşiyor. Gözleri kısa bir süreliğine çatlak bir cam gibi bulanıklaşıyor ve aniden gözü yaşlı, incinmiş yaşlı bir kadın gibi görünüyor. Öne doğru adım atarak topuğunun altında bir boncuğu eziyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Tonterías!». {n}Desprovista de sus cuentas de oración habituales, la duquesa clava los dedos en el borde de su cinturón.{/n} «Solo me dijo que Ovedius Gaprak llegaría en solitario. Mi casa lleva años luchando contra la influencia de esos advenedizos con cerebro de servidor, por lo que habría sido una insensatez dejar pasar la oportunidad de...». {n}Al oírse, la duquesa calla. Por un momento, sus ojos se nublan y se vuelven vidriosos, y da la impresión de ser una simple anciana, llorosa y dolida. Da un paso al frente, aplastando una cuenta bajo su tacón.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nonsense!" {n}Bereft of her usual prayer beads, the duchess digs her fingers into the edge of her ornately decorated belt.{/n} "All she told me was that Ovedius Gaprak would arrive unaccompanied. For years, my house has battled against the influence of those servitor-brained upstarts; it would have been foolish not to seize such a shining opportunity..." {n}The duchess falls silent upon hearing her own words. Her eyes briefly cloud over like cracked glass, and suddenly she looks like a tearful, hurt old woman. She takes a step forward, crushing a bead under her heel.{/n}

Mi casa lleva años luchando contra la influencia de esos advenedizos con cerebro de servidor, por lo que habría sido una insensatez dejar pasar la oportunidad de...». {n}Al oírse, la duquesa calla. Por un momento, sus ojos se nublan y se vuelven vidriosos, y da la impresión de ser una simple anciana, llorosa y dolida. Da un paso al frente, aplastando una cuenta bajo su tacón.{/n}

languages.text: « Mais enfin ! » {n}Privée de son habituel chapelet, la duchesse s'accroche à sa ceinture richement décorée.{/n} « Tout ce qu'elle m'a dit, c'est qu'Ovedius Gaprak viendrait seul. Des années durant, ma maison a lutté contre l'influence de ces arrivistes aussi écervelés que des servitors. Il aurait été stupide de ne pas saisir une telle occasion... » {n}Lorsqu'elle entend ses propres paroles, la duchesse se tait. Son regard se voile brièvement, comme du verre brisé, et elle a soudain l'air d'une vieille dame blessée au bord des larmes. Elle avance d'un pas, écrasant une perle au passage.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Nonsense!" {n}Bereft of her usual prayer beads, the duchess digs her fingers into the edge of her ornately decorated belt.{/n} "All she told me was that Ovedius Gaprak would arrive unaccompanied. For years, my house has battled against the influence of those servitor-brained upstarts; it would have been foolish not to seize such a shining opportunity..." {n}The duchess falls silent upon hearing her own words. Her eyes briefly cloud over like cracked glass, and suddenly she looks like a tearful, hurt old woman. She takes a step forward, crushing a bead under her heel.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Mais enfin ! » {n}Privée de son habituel chapelet, la duchesse s'accroche à sa ceinture richement décorée.{/n} « Tout ce qu'elle m'a dit, c'est qu'Ovedius Gaprak viendrait seul. Des années durant, ma maison a lutté contre l'influence de ces arrivistes aussi écervelés que des servitors. Il aurait été stupide de ne pas saisir une telle occasion... » {n}Lorsqu'elle entend ses propres paroles, la duchesse se tait. Son regard se voile brièvement, comme du verre brisé, et elle a soudain l'air d'une vieille dame blessée au bord des larmes. Elle avance d'un pas, écrasant une perle au passage.{/n}

languages.text: "Unsinn!" {n}Ihrer üblichen Gebetsperlen beraubt, gräbt die Herzogin ihre Finger in ihren kunstvoll verzierten Gürtel.{/n} "Sie hat mir nur gesagt, Ovedius Gaprak würde allein kommen. Mein Haus hat viele Jahre lang gegen den Einfluss dieser Emporkömmlinge gekämpft. Es wäre töricht gewesen, eine solche Möglichkeit nicht zu ergreifen ..." {n}Die Herzogin verstummt angesichts ihrer eigenen Worte. Ihre Augen trüben sich für einen kurzen Moment und sie wirkt mit einem Mal wie eine gebrochene alte Frau. Sie tritt einen Schritt vor und zertritt mit ihrer Ferse eine Perle.{/n}
